🚀 We’re Hiring: AI Solutions Architect (Contract | Remote)

Are you passionate about designing intelligent, scalable, and future-ready enterprise solutions? Join us at Yaza as an AI Solutions Architect and play a key role in shaping AI-driven transformation across enterprise ecosystems.

🔹 Role Overview
We’re looking for a seasoned professional to lead the governance, design, and delivery of AI-powered and automation solutions across CRM, ERP, and iPaaS platforms. You’ll work at the intersection of architecture, AI innovation, and enterprise integration.

🔹 Employment Type: Contractual
🌍 Work Mode: Remote

🔹 Key Responsibilities
• Architect and deliver AI-driven solutions across enterprise platforms
• Design scalable integrations using REST/GraphQL APIs, event streaming, ETL/ELT, and webhooks
• Lead AI/ML initiatives including LLM workflows, agentic AI systems, predictive analytics, or document processing
• Collaborate with stakeholders to translate business needs into robust technical architectures
• Ensure alignment with enterprise technology operating models and governance standards

🔹 Required Skills & Experience

* CRM: Salesforce, HubSpot, Dynamics 365

* iPaaS: MuleSoft, Boomi, Workato, Azure Integration Services
  ✔️ Hands-on experience deploying AI/ML solutions in production environments
  ✔️ Strong understanding of modern integration patterns
  ✔️ Excellent communication with both technical and business stakeholders

✨ Experience with RAG architectures, vector databases, or AI fine-tuning
✨ Knowledge of AI governance frameworks (NIST AI RMF, EU AI Act)
✨ Cloud certifications (AWS, Azure, GCP)
✨ Experience in regulated industries (Finance, Healthcare, Manufacturing)

🚀 Hiring: AIML Engineer – Molecular Dynamics (Remote)
We are looking for a highly skilled AIML Engineer with hands-on experience in Molecular Dynamics to join our team. This is a unique opportunity to work at the intersection of Machine Learning, Data Engineering, and Scientific Computing, contributing to cutting-edge solutions in a data-driven environment.


📍 Location-Remote (India)
⏰ Shift-Day Shift
💼 Experience-4 – 7 Years
🧑‍💻 Employment Type-Contract to Hire


🔍 Role Overview
As an AIML Engineer, you will be responsible for building and deploying machine learning models, designing data pipelines, and working with molecular simulation data to drive meaningful insights. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to integrate intelligent solutions into business applications.


🛠️ Key Responsibilities
🔹 Data Engineering
Write complex SQL queries to extract, transform, and load (ETL) data from relational databases
Build and maintain scalable data pipelines for ML workflows
🔹 Machine Learning Development
Develop and fine-tune ML models (classification, regression, clustering)
Work with libraries such as Scikit-learn, XGBoost
🔹 Pipeline Automation
Design automated workflows for model training, evaluation, and retraining
Ensure continuous performance optimization of models
🔹 Feature Engineering
Analyze raw datasets and create meaningful features to improve model accuracy
🔹 Collaboration
Work closely with Data Engineers, Product Managers, and domain experts
Translate business requirements into technical solutions


🧪 Must-Have Skills
Strong proficiency in Python and SQL
Hands-on experience in Molecular Dynamics / Molecular Simulation
Experience with ML frameworks (Scikit-learn, XGBoost, etc.)
Good understanding of data pipelines and ETL processes


⭐ Good-to-Have Skills
Experience with Molecular Dynamics tools like GROMACS, LAMMPS, NAMD, or AMBER
Knowledge of computational chemistry / bioinformatics
Exposure to cloud platforms or large-scale data processing
Experience in scientific data analysis


🧠 What We’re Looking For
Strong problem-solving and analytical skills
Ability to work independently in a remote setup
Good communication and collaboration skills
Passion for applying AI/ML in scientific domains


🎯 Why Join Us?
Work on cutting-edge AI + scientific computing problems
Opportunity to collaborate with cross-functional global teams
Flexible remote work environment


👉 If you’re excited about combining Machine Learning with Molecular Dynamics, we’d love to hear from you!
📩 Interested candidates (immediate joiners / serving notice) can share their updated resume along with ID proof at:
👉 deepika.sahu@teamlease.com
